response.step_by_step_log: 1. Watched the video in its entirety to map scenes based on the content (introduction, merchandise showcase, and final announcement). 2. Evaluated all segments for vocal music or singing. 3. Confirmed that the video contains only speech by the performer, Nekomata Okayu, accompanied by instrumental background music. No vocal songs or sung lyrics were detected. 4. Constructed the JSON response to reflect this analysis.
response.global_summary: Nekomata Okayu presents her 2026 birthday merchandise and announces a new original song. The video consists of the VTuber speaking throughout with instrumental background music.

scenes.description: Nekomata Okayu introduces her birthday goods.
Nekomata Okayu showcases various birthday merchandise, including a happi, acrylic stand, BIG tumbler, and shoulder pouch, along with a full set bonus.
Nekomata Okayu announces the upcoming release of a new original song.
